title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SM-10G-S-20
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SM-10G-S-20 is an SFP+ data transmission module using single-mode optical fiber. The data transfer rate is 10 Gbps, the maximum power consumption is 1 W, and the transmission range reaches 10 km SFP+ module Single-mode, 10 Gb/s Power consumption 1W Range 10 km GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
